name: Chicken Thigh

pros.title: protein is highly usable
pros.explanation: Reinforces the practical usefulness of the amino acid profile beyond the raw numbers.

pros.title: animal-source minerals are generally easier to absorb
pros.explanation: That matters because the iron and zinc story in meat is usually more practical than the label alone suggests.

pros.title: can be filling for the calories
pros.explanation: Protein-rich foods often help fullness in practice.

cons.title: healthiness depends a lot on preparation
cons.explanation: Breaded or heavily fried versions can shift the health profile substantially.

cons.title: needs careful storage and cooking
cons.explanation: Food safety risk is a real practical drawback versus some wholefoods.

cons.title: comes with ethical sourcing questions
cons.explanation: Production context may matter to some viewers beyond nutrition alone.

sourceNotes: Sample data for FoodRanked test pack.
Values are approximate and should be replaced with canonical source data later.
